options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: mode
options.description:
Which mode you are playing on.
Practice Mode: You need to unlock the stage in order to progress.
Normal Mode: The resources are only given at Stage 1.
Spell Practice: Each Spell Card in Spell Practice are locations.
Restriction in life, bomb or difficulty for stages 3/4 and 5/6 and character are the only logical gate

options.name: stage_unlock
options.description:
[Practice] How the stage unlock are grouped in Practice mode and for the Extra Stage if it's apart
Global: No group
By Character: Stage group by character

options.name: progressive_stage
options.description: [Practice] In Practice mode, determine if stages are unlocked progressively

options.name: exclude_lunatic
options.description: [Practice/Normal] If the Lunatic difficulty is excluded

options.name: characters
options.description:
Which characters are included.
All solo characters will be unlocked by default. If both solo and teams are included, no team will be unlocked at the start.

options.name: spell_cards_teams
options.description:
[Spell Practice] How many teams will have spell practice check. (Determine the number of time you have to do a spell card)
The starting team will always be one of the teams who have access to spell practice.
Solo character will always have spell cards if they are enabled.

options.name: number_life_mid
options.display_name: Number of life expected in order to face Keine, Reimu and Marisa
options.description: [Practice/Normal] Number of life the randomizer expect you to have before facing Keine, Reimu and Marisa

options.name: number_bomb_mid
options.display_name: Number of bombs expected in order to face Keine, Reimu and Marisa
options.description: [Practice/Normal] Number of bombs the randomizer expect you to have before facing Keine, Reimu and Marisa

options.name: difficulty_mid
options.display_name: Difficulty in order to face Keine, Reimu and Marisa
options.description: [Practice/Normal] The difficulty expected in order to face Keine, Reimu and Marisa (Starting from Lunatic and got to Easy)

options.name: number_life_end
options.display_name: Number of life expected in order to face Reisen, Eirin and Kaguya
options.description: [Practice/Normal] Number of life the randomizer expect you to have before facing Reisen, Eirin and Kaguya

options.name: number_bomb_end
options.display_name: Number of bombs expected in order to face Reisen, Eirin and Kaguya
options.description: [Practice/Normal] Number of bombs the randomizer expect you to have before facing Reisen, Eirin and Kaguya

options.name: difficulty_end
options.display_name: Difficulty in order to face Reisen, Eirin and Kaguya
options.description: [Practice/Normal] The difficulty expected in order to face Reisen, Eirin and Kaguya (Starting from Lunatic and got to Easy)

options.name: extra_stage
options.display_name: Determine if the extra stage is included
options.description:
[Practice/Normal] Determine if the extra stage is included
Linear: The extra stage is considered as the 7th stage. Solo character will still have a separate item to unlock the extra stage.
Apart: The extra stage has it's own item for it to be unlocked
This option will follow the rule of how the stage are unlocked in Practice Mode (Global, By Character or By Shot Type)

options.name: number_life_extra
options.display_name: Number of life expected in order to face Mokou
options.description: [Practice/Normal] Number of life the randomizer expect you to have before facing Mokou

options.name: number_bomb_extra
options.display_name: Number of bombs expected in order to face Mokou
options.description: [Practice/Normal] Number of bombs the randomizer expect you to have before facing Mokou

options.name: difficulty_check
options.description: [Practice/Normal] If checks are separated by difficulty.

options.name: check_multiple_difficulty
options.description: [Practice/Normal] For difficulty check, choose if the check of the highest difficulty include the check of the lower difficulties that are unlocked. Can be changed later.

options.name: time_check
options.description:
[Practice/Normal] If having enough Time and finishing (by dying or clearing it) the Last Spell at the end of a stage grant a check
Only stages where the Time Goal is above 0 are concerned (stage 1 to 5)

options.name: time
options.description: [Practice/Normal] Determine if the abilty to gain Time is randomized.

options.name: both_stage_4
options.description: [Practice] Determine if each team has access to the stage 4A and 4B or only the one they are assigned

options.name: starting_spell_card_count
options.description: [Spell Practice] The number of Spell Card that will be automatically unlocked at the start.

options.name: spell_card_difficulties
options.description:
[Spell Practice] Choose which Spell Card can appear based on their difficulty. It must have at least one difficulty
Last Word are in the Extra Difficulty.
If empty, all difficulties will be included.

Valid Values: ["Easy", "Normal", "Hard", "Lunatic", "Extra"]

options.name: spell_card_stages
options.description:
[Spell Practice] Choose which Spell Card can appear based on their stage. It must have at least one stage.
If empty, all stages will be included.
If the combination of Spell Card Difficulties and Spell Card Stages exclude all Spell Cards from the game,
then all Spell Cards from Stage 1 will be included to avoid having no Spell Cards at all

Valid Values: ["Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3", "Stage 4A", "Stage 4B", "Stage 5", "Stage 6A", "Stage 6B", "Extra", "Last Word"]

options.name: max_spell_card_count
options.description:
[Spell Practice] The maximum number of Spell Card that can be unlocked.
Starting Spell Card is counted in this limit.

options.name: duplicate_spell_cards
options.description:
[Spell Practice] Percentage of fillers replaced by a duplicate Spell Cards in the item pool. This will allow out of logic checks.
It is applied before traps.

options.name: excluded_spell_cards
options.description:
[Spell Practice] Choose which Spell Cards will be excluded from the item pool.
Spell cards are identified by their id. They must be written like this: "XXX" ("001" to "222")

options.name: included_spell_cards
options.description:
[Spell Practice] Choose which Spell Cards will be included in the item pool. They will be included even if they should be excluded by other filters.
Spell cards are identified by their id. They must be written like this: "XXX" ("001" to "222")

options.name: goal
options.description:
Determine the goal.
Default to Kaguya when the selected goal is invalid or default to Kaguya's Treasure if Spell Card Practice is the only mode.

[Practice/Normal] Eirin/Kaguya/Mokou: You must beat the selected boss
[Practice/Normal] All Bosses: You must beat all the bosses (Mokou only when the Extra Stage is active)
[Spell Practice] Kaguya's Treasures: You must collect the 5 treasures.
[Spell Practice] Capture Spell Cards: You must capture a set number of unique Spell Cards. (Accessibility full is forced)

options.name: ending_required
options.display_name: How many time do you need to beat the required boss
options.description: [Practice/Normal] How many time do you need to beat the required boss if it's the selected goal.

options.name: treasure_location
options.description:
[Spell Practice] If the goal is set to Kaguya's Treasure, choose where the treasure are located.
Default to Local if the selected option is not possible (Ex: Spell Cards excluded)
Kaguya: They are on Kaguya's Spell Cards
Last Word: They are on Last Word's Spell Cards
Local: They are anywhere in the game
Anywhere: They are anywhere in the multiworld

options.name: treasure_final_spell_card
options.description:
[Spell Practice] If the goal is Kaguya's Treasures, which Spell Card is set has the victory condition and is unlocked with the 5 treasure
The value is the ID of the Spell Card.
If the Spell Card is excluded, it will do -1 to the spell card until it found a valid one.
Default to the last Spell Card of Kaguya.

Quick references by stages:
Stage 1:   1-13
Stage 2:   14-32
Stage 3:   33-54
Stage 4A:  55-77
Stage 4B:  78-100
Stage 5:   101-119
Stage 6A:  120-147
Stage 6B:  148-191
Extra:     192-205
Last Word: 206-222

options.name: capture_spell_cards_stage
options.description:
[Spell Practice] If the goal is set to Capture Spell Cards, choose from which stages the Spell Cards count for the goal.
If empty, all stages will be included.
If filters exclude all spell card of the selected stages, all stages will be included.

Valid Values: ["Stage 1", "Stage 2", "Stage 3", "Stage 4A", "Stage 4B", "Stage 5", "Stage 6A", "Stage 6B", "Extra", "Last Word"]

options.name: capture_spell_cards_count
options.display_name: Number of unique Spell Cards to capture
options.description:
[Spell Practice] If the goal is set to Capture Spell Cards, choose how many unique Spell Cards you need to capture to win.
If the number is higher than the available Spell Cards based on the filters, it will be reduced to the maximum possible.

options.name: death_link
options.description:
When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too. Can be changed later.
In Spell Practice, you can only receive Death Links.

options.name: death_link_trigger
options.description:
When does a death link is triggerd. Can be changed later.
Life: Send a death link when losing a life
Game Over: Send a death link when getting a game over

options.name: death_link_amnesty
options.description: Number of death before sending a DeathLink. Can be changed later.

options.name: ring_link
options.description: Whether your in-level Power Point gain/loss is linked to other players. Can be changed later.

options.name: limit_lives
options.description: [Practice/Normal] Limit on the maximum number of lives you can have. It only apply on the client, not on the item pool or logic. Can be changed later.

options.name: limit_bombs
options.description: [Practice/Normal] Limit on the maximum number of bombs you can have. It only apply on the client, not on the item pool generation or logic. Can be changed later

options.name: traps
options.display_name: Percentage of fillers that are traps
options.description: Percentage of fillers that are traps

options.name: power_point_trap
options.description:
Weight of the -50% power point trap.
This trap reduce the power point by 50%

options.name: bomb_trap
options.description:
Weight of the -1 bomb trap.
This trap remove 1 bomb

options.name: life_trap
options.description:
Weight of the -1 life trap.
This trap remove 1 life

options.name: reverse_movement_trap
options.description:
Weight of the Reverse Movement trap.
This trap reverse the movement of the player

options.name: aya_speed_trap
options.description:
Weight of the Aya speed trap.
This trap make the speed of the player more extreme (faster normally, slower focus)

options.name: freeze_trap
options.description:
Weight of the freeze trap.
This trap freeze the player for a short amount of time

options.name: power_point_drain_trap
options.description:
Weight of the power point drain trap.
This trap drain the power point of the player (1 power point per second)

options.name: reverse_human_youkai_gauge_trap
options.description:
Weight of the reverse human youkai trap.
This trap make the humain/Youkai gauge gain reversed but not the effect

options.name: extend_time_goal_trap
options.description:
Weight of the extend time goal trap.
Add 25% to the time requirement of the current stage
